3257930.name: Vassoul
3257930.description:
Vassoul is a stylish action game focused on expressive combat, character switching, and encounter-based scoring.
Master fluid combos, call in assists, and adapt to enemy types. Remember, how smooth you are is just as important as getting the job done.

Chain attacks with precision, build Flow to unleash finishers, and earn higher grades through variety, timing, and control. Switch characters on the fly, use assists mid-combo, and overcome enemies that demand the right approach—not just button mashing.

Inspired by classic character-action games with a pixel art aesthetic, Vassoul rewards flow, mastery, and style.
3257930.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
